title: Browse Discover feed scrollers and open filter modal
description: Verifies the Discover page loads, horizontal scrollers can be used, and the filter modal opens.

steps.description: Scroll horizontally through country filter chips

title: Apply multiple filters and see filtered results on the feed
description: Verifies that applying dietary, category, country, and max duration filters updates the feed to show recipe cards.

steps.description: Select dietary, category, country, and max duration filters
Click on "Apply" in the filter modal

title: Apply filters that return no recipes and verify empty state
description: Verifies the empty state message appears when no recipes match selected country and dietary filters.

steps.description: Select country and dietary filters that match no recipes
Click on "Apply" in the filter modal
Verify element "recipe card" is not visible

title: Re-open filter modal after empty results and broaden filters to recover results
description: Verifies users can adjust filters after an empty state and return to seeing recipe cards.

steps.description: Select country and dietary filters that match no recipes
Click on "Apply" in the filter modal
Select dietary, category, country, and max duration filters
Click on "Apply" in the filter modal

title: Change category selection via horizontal category bubbles and verify feed remains populated
description: Verifies that interacting with the category scroller does not break the feed and recipe cards are still visible after changing category context.

title: Change country filter chip selection and verify feed updates without errors
description: Verifies that selecting a country chip keeps the page functional and continues to display recipe cards (or a valid empty state).

steps.description: Scroll horizontally through country filter chips
Click on a country filter chip

title: Open filter modal, apply max duration only, and verify results still render
description: Verifies that applying only a max duration filter successfully returns to the feed and shows recipe cards.

steps.description: Select dietary, category, country, and max duration filters
Click on "Apply" in the filter modal

title: Open a recipe preview bottom sheet from the Explore grid
description: Verifies a user can open a recipe preview bottom sheet by tapping a grid cell.

steps.description: Verify element "3-column recipe image grid" is visible
Tap a grid cell to open recipe preview bottom sheet
Verify element "recipe preview bottom sheet" is visible

title: Dismiss the recipe preview bottom sheet by tapping outside
description: Verifies the recipe preview bottom sheet can be dismissed by tapping outside of it.

steps.description: Tap a grid cell to open recipe preview bottom sheet
Verify element "recipe preview bottom sheet" is visible
Tap outside bottom sheet to dismiss it
Verify element "recipe preview bottom sheet" is not visible
Verify element "3-column recipe image grid" is visible

title: Navigate to recipe detail from bottom sheet using View Recipe
description: Verifies the View Recipe button in the bottom sheet navigates to the recipe detail page.

steps.description: Tap a grid cell to open recipe preview bottom sheet
Tap View Recipe button in bottom sheet to navigate to recipe detail

title: Scroll the Explore grid to load more content and still open previews
description: Verifies scrolling through the grid continues to work and grid items remain tappable after scrolling.

steps.description: Verify element "3-column recipe image grid" is visible
Tap a grid cell to open recipe preview bottom sheet
Verify element "recipe preview bottom sheet" is visible

title: Explore grid is visible and usable after returning from recipe detail via in-app navigation
description: Verifies the user can reach recipe detail from Explore and then use in-app UI to return to Explore and continue browsing.

steps.description: Tap a grid cell to open recipe preview bottom sheet
Tap View Recipe button in bottom sheet to navigate to recipe detail
Click on "Explore" in the app navigation
Verify element "3-column recipe image grid" is visible

title: Subscribed user can view full ingredients and start cooking from Recipe Detail
description: Verifies a subscribed user can open the ingredients modal, see the full ingredients list, and proceed to cooking steps.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the feed
Verify text "Subscribe to see all ingredients" is not visible

title: Not subscribed user sees ingredients paywall notice and can open paywall from Recipe Detail
description: Verifies an unsubscribed user sees the locked ingredients notice and can navigate to the paywall.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the feed
Verify text "Subscribe to see all ingredients" is visible
Click the "Subscribe to see all ingredients" notice

title: Recipe Detail displays core recipe content (cover image/title/description)
description: Verifies the recipe page shows the essential visible content sections when opened from the feed.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the feed
Verify element "Recipe cover image" is visible

title: Chef name link from Recipe Detail navigates to Chef Profile
description: Verifies tapping the chef name on Recipe Detail routes to the chef profile page.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the feed
Click the chef name in the chef info section

title: Ingredients modal can be opened and closed from Recipe Detail
description: Verifies the ingredients modal opens from the Ingredients button and can be dismissed without leaving the recipe page.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the feed
Verify element "Ingredients" modal is not visible

title: Cook Now from Recipe Detail routes to cooking steps screen
description: Verifies the Cook Now call-to-action transitions the user from Recipe Detail to the cooking steps route.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the feed

title: Not subscribed user can still access Cook Now from Recipe Detail (gating handled elsewhere)
description: Verifies that for an unsubscribed user, the Cook Now action transitions away from Recipe Detail (either to cook steps or to a gate) without UI errors.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the feed
Verify text "Subscribe to see all ingredients" is visible

title: Open paywall and view chef info and pricing options
description: Verifies the paywall page loads for an authenticated user and displays chef information and subscription options.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed

title: Select Monthly plan and initiate subscription
description: Verifies a user can select the monthly option and start the subscription flow from the paywall.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed

title: Select Annual plan and initiate subscription
description: Verifies a user can select the annual option and start the subscription flow from the paywall.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed

title: Verify selected plan state changes when switching between Monthly and Annual
description: Verifies the user can toggle between plans and the UI reflects the selection before subscribing.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed

title: Subscribe button is blocked or prompts selection when no plan is chosen
description: Verifies the paywall prevents initiating subscription without selecting a plan (or provides an on-screen prompt).

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed
Verify text "Select a plan" is visible

title: Payment failure shows an error and allows retry (Monthly plan)
description: Verifies that when checkout fails after subscribing to the monthly plan, the user sees an error message and can try again.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed

title: Chef profile information is visible on the paywall
description: Verifies the paywall includes visible chef identity details (name/avatar) to confirm who the subscription applies to.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed

title: Paywall shows pricing copy for both Monthly and Annual options
description: Verifies pricing information is present for both plans so users can compare before subscribing.

steps.description: Click on any recipe card in the Discover feed

title: Advance through cooking steps to completion screen
description: Verifies a logged-in user can progress through all cooking steps and reach the completion screen.

steps.description: Click on a recipe card in the feed to open its recipe detail page
Click the "Cook" button to enter step-by-step cooking mode

title: Back navigation returns to previous step
description: Verifies the Back control returns the user to the immediately previous cooking step.

steps.description: Click on a recipe card in the feed to open its recipe detail page
Click the "Cook" button to enter step-by-step cooking mode

title: Step instructions are visible and update after tapping Next
description: Verifies the step instruction content is visible and changes when advancing to the next step.

steps.description: Click on a recipe card in the feed to open its recipe detail page
Click the "Cook" button to enter step-by-step cooking mode

title: Final step routes to completion screen
description: Verifies that finishing the last step transitions the user to the recipe completion screen.

steps.description: Click on a recipe card in the feed to open its recipe detail page
Click the "Cook" button to enter step-by-step cooking mode
Repeatedly click the "Next" button until the app transitions away from the steps view

title: Back is disabled or does nothing on the first step
description: Verifies that on the first cooking step, the user cannot navigate to a previous step.

steps.description: Click on a recipe card in the feed to open its recipe detail page
Click the "Cook" button to enter step-by-step cooking mode

title: Step 1 validation: cannot proceed without required basics (title/description/cover)
description: Verifies Step 1 blocks progression when required basics are missing and shows a visible validation message.

title: Step 2 ingredients: add an ingredient with name, amount, and unit and proceed
description: Verifies adding at least one ingredient with all fields allows progressing to the next step.

steps.description: Fill "Test Recipe Title" into the title field
Fill "Test recipe description for E2E" into the description field

title: Step 2 validation: missing ingredient unit or amount prevents continuing
description: Verifies the wizard requires complete ingredient fields (name, amount, unit) before proceeding.

steps.description: Fill "Recipe Missing Ingredient Fields" into the title field

title: Country selection: selecting a country of origin advances to time step
description: Verifies Step 3 country selection is required and can be selected to proceed to Step 4.

steps.description: Fill "Country Step Test" into the title field

title: Time entry: set prep and cook time and proceed
description: Verifies Step 4 accepts prep and cook times and allows moving forward.

steps.description: Fill "Time Step Test" into the title field

title: Tag steps: select goal, meal type, and dietary tags and reach Step 8 video
description: Verifies Steps 5–7 selections work end-to-end and the wizard reaches the video step.

title: Update display name from Profile Menu using checkmark confirmation
description: Verifies a logged-in user can edit and save their display name from the Profile Menu and see the updated name.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation
Click the pencil icon to edit the display name
Type "Test Name Edit" into the display name field
Click the checkmark icon to confirm the name change
Verify text "Test Name Edit" is visible

title: Cancel display name edit with Escape key
description: Verifies a user can start editing their display name and cancel the edit with Escape without changing the visible name.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation
Verify the display name text is visible
Click the pencil icon to edit the display name
Type "This Should Not Save" into the display name field
Verify text "This Should Not Save" is not visible

title: Confirm display name edit using Enter key
description: Verifies a user can save a display name edit by pressing Enter and see the updated name on the Profile Menu.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation
Click the pencil icon to edit the display name
Type "Name Saved With Enter" into the display name field
Verify text "Name Saved With Enter" is visible

title: Navigate from Profile Menu to Share Profile page
description: Verifies the Share button on Profile Menu routes the user to the share page.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation

title: Navigate to Profile Settings from Profile Menu
description: Verifies a user can open the Profile Settings page from the Profile Menu and sees settings content.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation

title: Navigate to My Dishes from Profile Menu
description: Verifies a user can navigate to the My Dishes page from the Profile Menu and sees the dishes list page.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation

title: Open Switch Account popup from Profile Menu
description: Verifies the Switch Account control opens an account switcher popup with expected options.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation
Verify text "Add Another Account" is visible

title: Add Another Account option is reachable from Switch Account popup
description: Verifies that the Add Another Account action is available and routes the user to the authentication page to add credentials.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" entry in the app navigation

title: Open All Countries page and see countries list
description: Verifies the All Countries page loads and shows a visible list of countries to choose from.

title: Scroll through countries list and confirm more entries appear
description: Verifies the user can scroll the countries list and continue browsing without losing the page context.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the countries list
Verify at least one country name is visible

title: Select a country and land on Discover with country query parameter
description: Verifies tapping a country navigates to the Discover feed with a country filter reflected in the URL.

steps.description: Click on the first visible country in the list

title: Selected country is reflected on Discover page UI
description: Verifies the Discover page visually indicates the selected country filter after navigation from All Countries.

steps.description: Click on the first visible country in the list

title: Discover shows an empty state when selected country has no matching recipes
description: Verifies the app shows an empty state message when a selected country returns no results in Discover.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the countries list
Click on a country near the bottom of the list

title: Country selection works after scrolling (mid-list selection)
description: Verifies selecting a country after scrolling still navigates correctly to the filtered Discover feed.

steps.description: Scroll to the middle of the countries list
Click on a country visible in the middle of the list

title: All Countries page shows flags alongside country names
description: Verifies each country entry presents a flag icon (or flag placeholder) visibly next to the country name.

steps.description: Verify element "Country flag icon" is visible
Verify at least one country name is visible

title: Create a new meal plan with name and description and save
description: Verifies a signed-in user can create a meal plan and see it appear in the meal plans list.

title: Complete plan details step in Create Plan wizard
description: Verifies the Create Plan wizard accepts a plan name and description and proceeds to slot assignment.

steps.description: Type "Weekly Plan A" into the plan name field
Type "Meals for the week" into the plan description field

title: Assign a recipe to a breakfast slot via Browse Recipes overlay
description: Verifies the user can open the Browse Recipes overlay for a slot and select a recipe to populate it.

steps.description: Click the "Add" (or empty) button for the first day Breakfast slot

title: Save a meal plan after assigning at least one slot
description: Verifies saving a plan returns to /plans and the new plan is visible in the list.

title: View list of existing meal plans on /plans
description: Verifies the meal plans list page renders and shows existing plans section/list UI.

title: Validation: attempt to save with missing plan name shows an error
description: Verifies the wizard blocks saving when required plan name is empty and shows a visible validation message.

title: Cancel/exit Create Plan wizard returns to Plans list without saving
description: Verifies the user can exit the wizard and is returned to /plans without confirmation of a saved plan.

title: View chef profile header details (avatar, name, bio)
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open a chef profile and see the chef’s basic public information.

title: Open a chef profile from the app and view recipe list section
description: Verifies a logged-in user can reach a chef profile and scroll the published recipes area.

title: Navigate from chef profile to a recipe detail page via a recipe card
description: Verifies selecting a chef’s recipe from their profile navigates to the recipe detail experience.

steps.description: Click on the first visible recipe card

title: Subscribe button is visible on chef profile and opens subscription/paywall entry
description: Verifies the chef profile shows a Subscribe action and tapping it leads into a paywall/checkout entry state.

steps.description: Click on a visible chef name or chef avatar on a recipe card

title: Chef profile loads without recipes (empty state)
description: Verifies the chef profile handles a chef with no published recipes by showing an empty-state message.

title: View My Dishes grid for a logged-in chef
description: Verifies a chef can reach My Dishes and see their uploaded recipes grid.

title: Open a recipe detail from My Dishes
description: Verifies tapping a recipe card in My Dishes navigates to the recipe detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first recipe card in the grid

title: Start editing a recipe from My Dishes via the edit overlay
description: Verifies the edit control on a recipe from My Dishes opens the recipe creation wizard in edit mode.

steps.description: Click the "Edit" overlay/button on the first recipe card

title: Edit and submit changes to an existing recipe and return to recipe detail
description: Verifies a chef can submit an edit through the creation wizard and see the updated recipe detail page.

steps.description: Click the "Edit" overlay/button on the first recipe card

title: Cancel deletion from confirmation modal
description: Verifies canceling the delete confirmation leaves the recipe visible in My Dishes.

steps.description: Click the "Delete" button on the first recipe card
Verify text "Are you sure" is visible

title: Delete a recipe successfully from My Dishes (if confirmation modal allows)
description: Verifies confirming deletion removes the recipe from the grid.

steps.description: Click the "Delete" button on the first recipe card
Click "Confirm" in the deletion confirmation modal
